message: ℹ️ Low Organic Matter — FYM Recommended.
action: Apply 50-100 kg/acre well-rotted Farmyard Manure (FYM) before sowing. Combine with chemical fertilizers for best soil health. Consider incorporating rice straw/crop residue to improve OC over seasons. OC detected: 0.412%
Probable causes: moisture deficit, nutrient deficiency, or pest pressure. Check field conditions. Consider irrigation and supplementary soil testing. NDVI: 0.246 (threshold: 0.35)
